reasoning: The key limiter for you is the poor lactate clearance, as evidenced by the 9.3% decline in your power curve from 5-min to 20-min efforts. With your recent rides showing improving recovery, we're targeting your power and endurance consistency over longer durations. This workout will build fatigue resistance essential for the Alpine Loop, especially on the Sundance to Cascade Springs climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x8min over-unders: 4min at 242-256W, 4min at 201-218W. Short recovery in between.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
